meta.purpose: Graph input person profiles where JD-backed fields are materialized from JD_Catalog.json.
meta.resolution_rule: Role, location, reporting baseline, and technical baseline are copied from the linked JD document.

people.name: Petra Novakova
people.jd_file: job_descriptions/source_docs/Job Descriptions/HR Director.docx
people.location_from_jd: Group / Multi-site (Europe HQ with frequent travel to production sites and sales subsidiaries)
people.direct_reports_from_jd: 3-5 Country HR Leads and HR Experts; total org span 11–50 FTE across countries/sites
people.business_knowledge_baseline_from_jd: End-to-end understanding of plant and commercial operations in FMCG/food production; familiarity with BRC/IFS-driven environments and their HR implications; strong financial acumen (workforce cost modeling, productivity, ROI on People initiatives); experience navigating multi-entity, acquisition-driven environments.
people.jd_role_summary: Leads the Group HR function with enterprise-wide impact on policies, standards, and people outcomes across all production sites and offices. Sets the People strategy to enable high growth, M&A integration, and culture harmonization in a dynamic, fast-paced environment—building scalable processes from the ground up while safeguarding compliance and workforce engagement.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: People Strategy & Governance
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Define and execute the Group People strategy (workforce planning, org design, culture, DEI) aligned to company growth and M&A roadmap to drive capability, engagement, and productivity.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Talent Acquisition & Employer Brand
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Lead TA across countries to meet ramp-up needs; reduce time-to-fill and improve quality-of-hire; steward Group employer brand and partnerships.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Total Rewards & Performance
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Own Group C&B frameworks (base pay, incentives, benefits) and performance management; ensure external competitiveness, internal equity, and pay-for-performance discipline.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: HR Operations & Systems
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Standardize HR policies, employee lifecycle processes, and HRIS/data across sites; deliver reliable payroll interfaces and self-service; drive data integrity and People analytics.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Learning, Leadership & Culture
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Build L&D architecture (onboarding, technical/plant training, leadership academies) to support safety, quality, and continuous improvement; accelerate manager capability.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: M&A and Integration
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Lead HR due diligence, integration planning, and post-close harmonization (policies, grades, benefits, culture) to protect continuity and realize synergies.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Employee Relations & Compliance
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Ensure compliant ER practices across jurisdictions (works councils/unions where present), health & safety collaboration, and audit readiness; mitigate labor risk.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Stakeholder Leadership & Change
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Advise Executives and Senior Leaders; lead change communications and organization-wide initiatives (e.g., org redesign, restructures, new site start-ups).

people.jd_relative_path: job_descriptions/source_docs/Job Descriptions/HR Director.docx

people.name: Filip Hruby
people.jd_file: job_descriptions/source_docs/Job Descriptions/IT Director.docx
people.location_from_jd: Multi-site (Europe HQ with frequent travel to production sites and sales subsidiaries)
people.direct_reports_from_jd: 5–8 Country IT Leads and IT Experts; total org span 11–50 FTE across countries/sites
technical_skills_baseline_from_jd: ERP/MES/WMS Platforms (e.g., SAP, Microsoft Dynamics, Infor; MES/SCADA) — Advanced
Data Platform & Integration (ETL/iPaaS, APIs, MDM) — Advanced
people.business_knowledge_baseline_from_jd: End-to-end understanding of manufacturing and supply chain processes (plan/make/move/sell), commercial applications, and compliance contexts; financial acumen for business cases and TCO; experience in multi-entity, acquisition-driven environments.
people.jd_role_summary: Leads the IT function with enterprise-wide impact on technology strategy, policies, and platforms across all production sites and offices. Builds a scalable, secure, and data-enabled technology foundation to support high growth, M&A integration, and continuous improvement—standardizing the core stack while enabling local agility.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Technology Strategy & Governance
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Define the IT strategy and operating model (architecture principles, standards, service catalog, SLAs, RACI) aligned with business growth and M&A roadmap.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Enterprise Architecture & Roadmaps
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Set target architecture for core platforms (ERP, MES/SCADA, WMS/TMS, CRM, HRIS, Data/ Analytics) and lead multi-year modernization and consolidation roadmaps.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Cybersecurity & Risk
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Establish enterprise security policies and controls (e.g., ISO 27001/NIST-aligned), manage risk assessments, incident response, and audit readiness across IT/OT environments.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Applications & Data Enablement
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Govern application portfolio, master data, and integration patterns; enable analytics, automation, and AI/ML through a governed data platform and KPI suite.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Infrastructure & Connectivity
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Standardize networks, identity & access, end-user services, and cloud/on‑prem hybrid infrastructure; ensure resilience, performance, disaster recovery (DR) and business continuity (BCP), and cost efficiency.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: M&A and Integration
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Lead IT due diligence, Day‑1 readiness, and post-close integration (systems, data, cyber, infrastructure) to minimize business disruption and realize synergies.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Vendor & Portfolio Management
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Own strategic vendor selection, contracts, and performance; prioritize and steer the IT project/program portfolio to deliver value on time and budget.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Change Leadership & Stakeholder Management
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Advise executives and site leaders; drive change communications, adoption, and training for technology-enabled transformations.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Illustrative KPIs
jd_key_responsibilities.description: platform uptime & incident MTTR, cyber posture/controls coverage, on-time/on-budget delivery, ERP/MES rollout milestones, integration cycle time, cost-to-serve per user/site, audit findings, data quality SLAs.

people.jd_relative_path: job_descriptions/source_docs/Job Descriptions/IT Director.docx

people.name: Marek Sramek
people.jd_file: job_descriptions/source_docs/Job Descriptions/Finance Director.docx
people.location_from_jd: Enterprise / Multi-site (Europe HQ with regular travel to production sites and sales subsidiaries)
people.direct_reports_from_jd: 3–6 Finance Leads (e.g., Country Finance Leads, Group Accounting Lead, FP&A Lead, Tax & Treasury Lead); total org span 11–50 FTE across countries/sites
technical_skills_baseline_from_jd: Financial Risk Management & Internal Controls — Advanced
Finance Systems & Digitalization (ERP, consolidation tools, BI) — Advanced
people.business_knowledge_baseline_from_jd: Strong understanding of manufacturing and supply chain economics (plants, inventory, logistics), commercial models (pricing, trade terms, channel margins), and industry dynamics in FMCG/food; solid knowledge of multi‑entity and multi‑country structures, including implications for tax, transfer pricing, and reporting.
people.jd_role_summary: Leads the Finance function with enterprise-wide responsibility for financial strategy, performance management, and control across all entities. Designs and builds scalable finance capabilities (processes, systems, governance) to support high growth, M&A integration, and continuous improvement, while safeguarding liquidity, compliance, and value creation.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Financial Strategy & Planning
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Lead the development of financial strategies, long‑term plans, budgets, and forecasts to support business objectives and growth ambitions across the group.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Performance Management & Controlling
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Lead financial performance management (P&L, balance sheet, cash, capex) across plants and commercial entities; analyze variances versus budget/forecast and drive corrective actions with business leaders.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Cash Flow, Funding & Treasury
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Lead cash flow planning, working capital optimization, and treasury activities; ensure adequate liquidity, efficient use of capital, and compliance with financing covenants.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Financial Reporting & Consolidation
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Lead timely and accurate monthly, quarterly, and annual reporting; oversee consolidation of financial statements for all legal entities in line with applicable accounting standards.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Compliance, Tax & Audit
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Ensure compliance with legal, tax, and regulatory requirements as well as applicable accounting frameworks; lead interactions with external auditors, tax advisors, regulatory authorities, and financial institutions.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Cost & Process Optimization
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Identify and lead cost optimization, margin improvement, and efficiency initiatives; drive automation and digitalization of end‑to‑end finance processes (P2P, O2C, R2R).

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Decision Support & Investment Analysis
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Provide financial analysis and recommendations to the Executive Team and senior leaders; evaluate investment opportunities, business cases, and M&A transactions, including ROI and risk/return trade‑offs.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Risk Management & Internal Controls
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Lead identification, assessment, and management of financial risks; design and maintain internal control frameworks and contingency plans to protect company assets and ensure stability.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Team Leadership & Cross-functional Collaboration
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Lead, develop, and coach Finance Leads and teams across countries; ensure effective collaboration between finance and other functions (Operations, Supply Chain, Sales, HR, IT) to enable informed decision‑making.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Investor & Stakeholder Communication (if applicable)
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Lead preparation of financial materials for presentations to investors, shareholders, banks, and other external stakeholders, ensuring transparency and consistency of financial information.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Illustrative KPIs
jd_key_responsibilities.description: revenue and margin performance vs. plan, working capital and cash conversion, forecast accuracy, cost savings and productivity gains, audit findings, on‑time closing, automation/digitalization milestones, return on investments.

people.jd_relative_path: job_descriptions/source_docs/Job Descriptions/Finance Director.docx

people.name: Tomas Benes
people.jd_file: job_descriptions/source_docs/Job Descriptions/Procurement Director.docx
people.location_from_jd: Group (covering all production sites and sales subsidiaries)
people.direct_reports_from_jd: Strategic Buyers
people.jd_role_summary: Leads the Group’s strategic procurement function, defining sourcing strategies, supplier partnerships, and risk management frameworks to ensure long-term competitiveness and sustainability. This role focuses on building procurement capabilities, driving cost optimization, and supporting growth initiatives such as M&A and new product development, rather than day-to-day operational purchasing.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Develop Group Procurement Strategy
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Design and implement long-term sourcing strategies aligned with business growth, sustainability, and cost-efficiency objectives.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Supplier Portfolio Management
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Establish and maintain strategic partnerships with global and regional suppliers to secure innovation, quality, and supply continuity.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Risk & Compliance Governance
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Define procurement policies and risk management frameworks to ensure compliance with regulatory and certification standards (e.g., BRC, IFS).

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Cost Optimization & Value Creation
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Drive initiatives for cost reduction, process efficiency, and value-added supplier collaboration across all categories.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Support Growth & M&A Integration
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Lead procurement due diligence and integration planning for acquisitions and new business units.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Digital Transformation
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Implement advanced procurement tools (ERP, e-sourcing platforms) to enhance transparency, analytics, and decision-making.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Cross-functional Leadership
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Collaborate with Operations, Finance, Quality, and R&D to align procurement strategies with production excellence and innovation goals.

people.jd_relative_path: job_descriptions/source_docs/Job Descriptions/Procurement Director.docx

people.name: Eva Kralikova
people.jd_file: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Chief Operating Officer.docx
people.location_from_jd: Group / Multi-site (Europe HQ with frequent travel to production sites and sales subsidiaries)
people.direct_reports_from_jd: Plant Director, Group Supply Chain Director, Head of Group Quality, senior operations leaders across sites
technical_skills_baseline_from_jd: Capacity, Cost, and Service Trade-off Management - Advanced
people.business_knowledge_baseline_from_jd: Strong understanding of plant operations, network planning, service models, procurement dependencies, and the cost/service implications of operational choices in a multi-entity environment.
people.jd_role_summary: Leads the Group Operations agenda across manufacturing, supply chain execution, quality coordination, and operational transformation. Shapes the operating model needed for scale, resilience, and continuous improvement while aligning plant performance, service levels, and investment priorities with the company's growth ambitions.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Operations Strategy & Performance
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Define and execute the Group operations strategy across plants and fulfillment activities; set the performance cadence, target metrics, and management routines that align local execution with enterprise goals.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Plant Governance
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Oversee plant leadership across sites; ensure safe, stable, and efficient manufacturing operations, clear accountability, and disciplined escalation of production, labor, quality, and continuity issues.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Supply and Service Alignment
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Coordinate with Supply Chain, Procurement, Commercial, and Finance to balance service, cost, inventory, and capacity trade-offs in support of business priorities.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Operational Excellence
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Lead continuous improvement programs focused on throughput, waste reduction, labor productivity, planning discipline, and process standardization across the network.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Quality & Compliance Coordination
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Ensure that quality, food safety, and operational compliance expectations are embedded into the operating model and consistently executed across sites.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Capex & Transformation Prioritization
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Steer plant and operations investment priorities, including automation, expansion, asset replacement, and site improvement programs, to maximize business value and resilience.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: M&A and Integration
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Lead the operations workstream for acquisitions and integrations, including Day-1 readiness, manufacturing continuity, footprint alignment, and synergy execution.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Leadership & Change
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Coach senior operations leaders, drive cross-site collaboration, and reinforce a culture of ownership, pace, and fact-based decision-making.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Illustrative KPIs
jd_key_responsibilities.description: OTIF/service level, plant OEE, yield and waste, labor productivity, inventory health, quality incidents, safety metrics, capex delivery, and cost-to-serve.

people.jd_relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Chief Operating Officer.docx

people.name: Jozef Polak
people.jd_file: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Plant Director.docx
people.direct_reports_from_jd: Production Manager, Head of Engineering and Reliability, local Quality and Logistics leadership, selected support managers
technical_skills_baseline_from_jd: Quality, Food Safety, and Compliance Coordination - Advanced
people.business_knowledge_baseline_from_jd: Strong understanding of plant economics, labor constraints, production scheduling, quality impact, and operational trade-offs within a larger multi-site organization.
people.jd_role_summary: Leads the end-to-end performance of the plant, ensuring safe, efficient, and compliant production while coordinating people, assets, planning, quality, and support functions. Owns the local operating rhythm and translates Group priorities into disciplined plant execution.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Plant Performance Leadership
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Lead day-to-day and medium-term plant performance across production, quality, engineering, logistics, and people coordination; ensure stable execution against output, service, and cost targets.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Production & Resource Coordination
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Coordinate production plans, labor deployment, asset availability, and operational priorities to deliver a reliable manufacturing schedule.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Safety, Quality & Compliance
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Ensure that food safety, quality, and operational compliance requirements are embedded into daily routines and escalated quickly when risk emerges.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Operational Escalation Management
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Own the plant response to major disruptions, including equipment downtime, staffing constraints, quality incidents, and supply interruptions.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Continuous Improvement
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Drive site-level improvement initiatives in yield, throughput, waste, labor productivity, planning discipline, and standard work.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Cross-functional Execution
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Work closely with Supply Chain, Engineering, Quality, HR, Finance, and IT to ensure that plant needs are visible and translated into practical action.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Budget & Asset Stewardship
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Manage local budget areas, operating expenses, and plant asset priorities in line with approved plans and performance expectations.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: People Leadership
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Lead and develop the site leadership team; establish clarity, accountability, and a strong execution culture across the plant.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Illustrative KPIs
jd_key_responsibilities.description: OEE, schedule attainment, yield, waste, labor productivity, safety metrics, quality deviations, service performance, and local cost performance.

people.jd_relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Plant Director.docx

people.name: Michal Hronec
people.jd_file: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Head of Engineering and Reliability.docx
people.direct_reports_from_jd: Project and Process Engineers, maintenance planning specialists, selected technical experts
technical_skills_baseline_from_jd: Process Improvement & Technical Problem Solving - Advanced
people.business_knowledge_baseline_from_jd: Strong understanding of how equipment stability, engineering standards, production planning, and quality expectations interact in a high-throughput manufacturing environment.
people.jd_role_summary: Leads technical reliability, engineering governance, and operational asset improvement for the plant. Builds the maintenance and engineering roadmap needed to improve uptime, technical stability, and delivery of process change while balancing capex, operational risk, and production realities.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Reliability Strategy
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Define and execute the plant reliability strategy for critical assets, maintenance planning, preventive routines, and technical risk reduction.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Engineering Governance
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Own engineering standards, technical documentation expectations, change control practices, and practical decision frameworks for modifications and upgrades.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Maintenance & Asset Health
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Partner with maintenance and operations teams to improve asset care, failure analysis, spare planning, and uptime performance.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Process Improvement Delivery
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Lead or sponsor engineering projects that improve throughput, reduce downtime, stabilize quality, or eliminate recurring technical losses.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Capex Planning & Execution
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Shape the site engineering roadmap and support business cases for capex, automation, asset replacement, and process redesign.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Root Cause Analysis
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Ensure that major breakdowns, recurring technical issues, and chronic line losses are investigated rigorously and translated into sustainable action.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Cross-functional Support
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Work closely with Production, Quality, Supply Chain, IT, and Procurement on technical priorities that affect plant performance and change delivery.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Team Leadership
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Lead and coach engineers and technical specialists; reinforce practical standards for ownership, documentation, and execution quality.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Illustrative KPIs
jd_key_responsibilities.description: planned vs. unplanned downtime, MTBF/MTTR, engineering project delivery, line reliability, maintenance compliance, and technical loss reduction.

people.jd_relative_path: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Head of Engineering and Reliability.docx

people.name: Lucia Benesova
people.jd_file: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Project and Process Engineer.docx
people.direct_reports_from_jd: No direct reports; may coordinate technicians, operators, and external vendors within projects
people.business_knowledge_baseline_from_jd: Good understanding of production flow, operator constraints, equipment dependencies, and the practical realities of implementing change in a live plant environment.
people.jd_role_summary: Supports plant performance through structured process improvement, technical project delivery, and practical problem-solving on production systems. Combines engineering analysis with hands-on implementation to improve line stability, throughput, and execution quality.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Process Analysis
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Analyze production processes, technical losses, bottlenecks, and workflow constraints to identify practical improvement opportunities.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Project Delivery
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Lead or support engineering projects, modifications, and technical workstreams from scoping and documentation through implementation and handover.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Operational Troubleshooting
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Partner with operations and maintenance teams on recurring technical issues, process instability, and line performance gaps.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Change Implementation
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Prepare technical change documentation, coordinate relevant stakeholders, and ensure implementation is controlled, traceable, and practical for plant use.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Performance Improvement
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Support initiatives to improve yield, changeover performance, throughput, process reliability, and operator usability.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Validation & Handover
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Verify that process changes and technical interventions achieve intended results and are embedded into standards and documentation.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Cross-functional Coordination
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Work with Quality, Production, Engineering, IT, and external vendors where process changes affect multiple workflows.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Illustrative KPIs
jd_key_responsibilities.description: project milestones, process improvement impact, reduction in recurring losses, technical change cycle time, and implementation quality.

people.name: Nina Havel
people.jd_file: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Application Manager and Smart Factory.docx
people.direct_reports_from_jd: IFS Application Specialist and selected application or support resources as assigned
technical_skills_baseline_from_jd: Smart Factory Use Case Design - Advanced
Business Process Translation into Digital Solutions - Advanced
people.business_knowledge_baseline_from_jd: Strong understanding of how plant execution, planning, and business process workflows depend on applications, data quality, and practical user adoption.
people.jd_role_summary: Leads the application landscape that connects plant operations, core business processes, and smart factory initiatives. Owns the roadmap for manufacturing-related applications, coordinates cross-functional adoption, and ensures that industrial digitalization is practical, governed, and tied to business value.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Application Ownership
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Own the lifecycle, roadmap, and support model for selected industrial and operational applications, including interfaces to ERP and plant systems.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Smart Factory Roadmap
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Define and prioritize smart factory use cases that improve visibility, data capture, workflow reliability, and operational decision-making.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Integration Coordination
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Coordinate application and data flows across ERP, MES, shopfloor tools, reporting layers, and plant processes in partnership with IT and operations stakeholders.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Business Partnering
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Act as the main point of contact for plant and operations teams on application needs, enhancements, adoption issues, and digitalization opportunities.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Governance & Change Management
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Ensure that new applications, enhancements, and automations follow clear ownership, documentation, training, and release practices.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Vendor & Delivery Coordination
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Coordinate external implementation partners, vendors, and internal IT resources to deliver sustainable changes on time and with acceptable supportability.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Operational Support Oversight
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Oversee issue triage, prioritization, and escalation for critical industrial application issues that affect production or planning continuity.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Illustrative KPIs
jd_key_responsibilities.description: application availability, issue resolution responsiveness, enhancement throughput, user adoption, and business impact of smart factory initiatives.

people.name: Erik Sykora
people.jd_file: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/IFS Application Specialist.docx
people.direct_reports_from_jd: No direct reports
technical_skills_baseline_from_jd: Functional Change Coordination - Intermediate to Advanced
people.business_knowledge_baseline_from_jd: Working understanding of ERP-supported processes in planning, procurement, finance, inventory, and operational support, including how system and process issues interact.
people.jd_role_summary: Supports the reliability, usability, and continuous improvement of the IFS ERP landscape. Acts as a hands-on specialist for issue resolution, process understanding, testing, and user support across ERP workflows that affect plant, planning, finance, procurement, and operational execution.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: ERP Support & Triage
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Investigate, prioritize, and resolve ERP-related issues or route them effectively to the right internal or external owners.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Process Understanding
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Understand the business workflows behind ERP incidents and enhancements, especially where operational, planning, procurement, or data dependencies are involved.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Testing & Release Support
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Prepare test cases, validate changes, and support controlled deployment of ERP enhancements, fixes, and process adjustments.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: User Enablement
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Support key users with issue clarification, practical workarounds, training reinforcement, and improved understanding of ERP process behavior.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Documentation & Knowledge Management
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Maintain clear documentation of recurring issues, process specifics, support resolutions, and functional design decisions.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Data & Master Data Troubleshooting
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Help identify and resolve issues related to configuration, process setup, or master data that impact ERP execution quality.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Continuous Improvement Support
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Contribute to the ERP improvement backlog by translating recurring business pain points into well-scoped support or enhancement proposals.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Illustrative KPIs
jd_key_responsibilities.description: incident resolution time, issue backlog quality, testing effectiveness, enhancement readiness, and user satisfaction for supported ERP processes.

people.name: Barbora Klinec
people.jd_file: job_descriptions/generated_final/Generated Job Descriptions Final/Business Intelligence Developer.docx
people.direct_reports_from_jd: No direct reports
technical_skills_baseline_from_jd: Documentation & Reporting Governance - Intermediate to Advanced
people.business_knowledge_baseline_from_jd: Good understanding of how reporting supports operational, financial, commercial, and planning decisions, including the importance of clear KPI ownership and data definitions.
people.jd_role_summary: Designs and delivers reporting, dashboards, and data models that help business and operational teams make better decisions. Translates business questions into usable analytics outputs while balancing data quality, usability, and maintainability across multiple stakeholder groups.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Dashboard & Report Delivery
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Build and maintain reports, dashboards, and self-service analytics outputs for executive, functional, and operational users.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Data Modeling
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Design and refine data models that support consistent KPI logic, reusable reporting structures, and practical business interpretation.

jd_key_responsibilities.title: Requirements Translation
jd_key_responsibilities.description: Work with business stakeholders to convert reporting needs into data, logic, and visualization requirements that can be delivered and sustained.
